'''鈭歫-ch-z''' ('''jachaza''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:champagnize|champagnize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-ch-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:champagnize|champagnize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歫-ch-z
|-
! Lemma
| jachaza
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:jachazithi|jachazithi]] || [[word:jachaziji|jachaziji]] || [[word:jachazishi|jachazishi]] || [[word:jachazi|jachazi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:jachazuthuth|jachazuthuth]] || [[word:jachazujuj|jachazujuj]] || [[word:jachazushush|jachazushush]] || [[word:jachaz|jachaz]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:jachazuthu|jachazuthu]] || [[word:jachazuju|jachazuju]] || [[word:jachazushu|jachazushu]] || [[word:jachazu|jachazu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:jachazufuth|jachazufuth]] || [[word:jachazufuj|jachazufuj]] || [[word:jachazufush|jachazufush]] || [[word:jachazuf|jachazuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:jachazethe|jachazethe]] || [[word:jachazeje|jachazeje]] || [[word:jachazeshe|jachazeshe]] || [[word:jachaze|jachaze]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:jachazothoth|jachazothoth]] || [[word:jachazojoj|jachazojoj]] || [[word:jachazoshosh|jachazoshosh]] || [[word:jachaz|jachaz]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:jachazotho|jachazotho]] || [[word:jachazojo|jachazojo]] || [[word:jachazosho|jachazosho]] || [[word:jachazo|jachazo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:jachazofoth|jachazofoth]] || [[word:jachazofoj|jachazofoj]] || [[word:jachazofosh|jachazofosh]] || [[word:jachazof|jachazof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:jachaz忙th忙|jachaz忙th忙]] || [[word:jachaz忙j忙|jachaz忙j忙]] || [[word:jachaz忙sh忙|jachaz忙sh忙]] || [[word:jachaz忙|jachaz忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:jachazathath|jachazathath]] || [[word:jachazajaj|jachazajaj]] || [[word:jachazashash|jachazashash]] || [[word:jachaz|jachaz]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:jachazatha|jachazatha]] || [[word:jachazaja|jachazaja]] || [[word:jachazasha|jachazasha]] || [[word:jachaza|jachaza]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:jachazafath|jachazafath]] || [[word:jachazafaj|jachazafaj]] || [[word:jachazafash|jachazafash]] || [[word:jachazaf|jachazaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:jachazasha|jachazasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gojachazasha|gojachazasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokijachazasha|gokijachazasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:jachazn眉sha|jachazn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gojachaznkn眉sha|gojachaznkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokijachazn眉sha|gokijachazn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:jachazsh毛sha|jachazsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojachaznksh毛sha|gojachaznksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokijachazsh毛sha|gokijachazsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:jachazrosha|jachazrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gojachaznkrosha|gojachaznkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokijachazrosha|gokijachazrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:jachazmusha|jachazmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gojachaznkmusha|gojachaznkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijachazmusha|gokijachazmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:jachazsherasha|jachazsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gojachaznksherasha|gojachaznksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokijachazsherasha|gokijachazsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:jachazngasha|jachazngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gojachaznkngasha|gojachaznkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokijachazngasha|gokijachazngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:jachazyasha|jachazyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gojachaznkyasha|gojachaznkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokijachazyasha|gokijachazyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:jachazyamasha|jachazyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gojachaznkyamasha|gojachaznkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokijachazyamasha|gokijachazyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:jachazn眉sh毛sha|jachazn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gojachaznkn眉sh毛sha|gojachaznkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokijachazn眉sh毛sha|gokijachazn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:jachazn眉rosha|jachazn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gojachaznkn眉rosha|gojachaznkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokijachazn眉rosha|gokijachazn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jachazn眉musha|jachazn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojachaznkn眉musha|gojachaznkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijachazn眉musha|gokijachazn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:jachazsh毛n眉sha|jachazsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gojachaznksh毛n眉sha|gojachaznksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokijachazsh毛n眉sha|gokijachazsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:jachazsh毛rosha|jachazsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gojachaznksh毛rosha|gojachaznksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokijachazsh毛rosha|gokijachazsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jachazsh毛musha|jachazsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojachaznksh毛musha|gojachaznksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijachazsh毛musha|gokijachazsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:jachazron眉sha|jachazron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gojachaznkron眉sha|gojachaznkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokijachazron眉sha|gokijachazron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:jachazrosh毛sha|jachazrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gojachaznkrosh毛sha|gojachaznkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokijachazrosh毛sha|gokijachazrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jachazromusha|jachazromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojachaznkromusha|gojachaznkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijachazromusha|gokijachazromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:jachazmun眉sha|jachazmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gojachaznkmun眉sha|gojachaznkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokijachazmun眉sha|gokijachazmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:jachazmush毛sha|jachazmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gojachaznkmush毛sha|gojachaznkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokijachazmush毛sha|gokijachazmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:jachazmurosha|jachazmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gojachaznkmurosha|gojachaznkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokijachazmurosha|gokijachazmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:jachaz|jachaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:j忙ch忙z|j忙ch忙z]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hojachaz|hojachaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hoj忙ch忙z|hoj忙ch忙z]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohojachaz|hohojachaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohoj忙ch忙z|hohoj忙ch忙z]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉jachaz|n眉jachaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉j忙ch忙z|n眉j忙ch忙z]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉jachaz|n眉n眉jachaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉j忙ch忙z|n眉n眉j忙ch忙z]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂jachaz|n茂jachaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂j忙ch忙z|n茂j忙ch忙z]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂jachaz|n茂n茂jachaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂j忙ch忙z|n茂n茂j忙ch忙z]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lujachaz|lujachaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:luj忙ch忙z|luj忙ch忙z]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulujachaz|lulujachaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluj忙ch忙z|luluj忙ch忙z]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lijachaz|lijachaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lij忙ch忙z|lij忙ch忙z]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilijachaz|lilijachaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilij忙ch忙z|lilij忙ch忙z]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kojachaz|kojachaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:koj忙ch忙z|koj忙ch忙z]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokojachaz|kokojachaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokoj忙ch忙z|kokoj忙ch忙z]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kejachaz|kejachaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kej忙ch忙z|kej忙ch忙z]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekejachaz|kekejachaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekej忙ch忙z|kekej忙ch忙z]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5390c6a}}
